parameters.formDescription: Enter your agency details. System scores leads, routes to GPT-4o or GPT-4o-mini, quality-gates emails, checks blacklist, notifies you on Telegram.

values.placeholder: e.g. We replace 30k/month SaaS with n8n automations

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: AI Lead Gen Machine Google Sheets

messages.content: You are a cold email quality auditor. Score the 3-email sequence on 5 dimensions each 1-10: Personalization, Relevance, Clarity, CTA_Strength, Human_feel. Total out of 50. Verdict: SEND if >=35, REVIEW if <35. Respond ONLY with JSON, no markdown: {"personalization":N,"relevance":N,"clarity":N,"cta_strength":N,"human_feel":N,"total":N,"verdict":"SEND or REVIEW","notes":"one-line reason"}

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: AI Lead Gen Machine Google Sheets

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: AI Lead Gen Machine Google Sheets
AI Lead Gen Machine Google Sheets

parameters.jsCode:
// Simulated send â€” preserve ALL lead + email fields for CRM
return $input.all().map(item => {
  const lead = item.json;
  const emailSlug = (lead.Email || lead.email || 'unknown').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'').toLowerCase().substring(0,15);
  const fakeId = 'SIM-' + emailSlug + '-' + Date.now();
  return { json: {
    'Thread ID': fakeId,
    'Status': 'Email 1 Sent (Simulated)',
    'Email 1 Sent At': new Date().toISOString(),
    'First Name': lead['First Name'] || lead.firstName || '',
    'Last Name': lead['Last Name'] || lead.lastName || '',
    'Company Name': lead['Company Name'] || lead.companyName || '',
    'Email': lead.Email || lead.email || '',
    'Title': lead.Title || lead.title || '',
    'Industry': lead.Industry || lead.industry || '',
    'Agency Name': lead['Agency Name'] || lead.agencyName || '',
    'Service': lead.Service || lead.service || '',
    'UVP': lead.UVP || lead.uvp || '',
    'Sender Email': lead['Sender Email'] || lead.senderEmail || '',
    'Sender Name': lead['Sender Name'] || lead.senderName || '',
    'Lead Score': lead['Lead Score'] || lead.leadScore || 0,
    'Tier': lead.Tier || lead.leadTier || 'STANDARD',
    'GPT Model': lead.gptModel || (lead.tier === 'premium' ? 'gpt-4o' : 'gpt-4o-mini'),
    'Quality Score': lead['Quality Score'] || 0,
    'Quality Notes': lead['Quality Notes'] || '',
    'Verdict': lead.Verdict || 'SEND',
    'Email 1 Subject': lead.email1_subject || '',
    'Email 1 Body': lead.email1_body || '',
    'Email 2 Subject': lead.email2_subject || '',
    'Email 2 Body': lead.email2_body || '',
    'Email 3 Subject': lead.email3_subject || '',
    'Email 3 Body': lead.email3_body || '',
    'Simulated': 'YES'
  } };
});
